summary: Completed testing of column order changes and new endpoints. All 11 features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Desktop dashboard column order: ПОДІЇ, МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ, SMM, МАРКЕТИНГ (left to right) ✓
2. Settings column order: менеджмент, smm, маркетинг, автоматизація ✓
3. Settings 4th column shows ONLY Google Calendar + Altegio status (no monthly tasks) ✓
4. Settings менеджмент column has 'ЩОМІСЯЦЯ' section with management monthly tasks at bottom ✓
5. Settings smm column has 'ЩОМІСЯЦЯ' section with smm monthly tasks at bottom ✓
6. Settings маркетинг column has 'ЩОМІСЯЦЯ' section with marketing monthly tasks at bottom ✓
7. Altegio status shows 'підключено' with 'активний' label in 4th settings column ✓
9. GET /api/docs/app-logic returns markdown file download (200 status) ✓
10. Stats page column order: ПОДІЇ, МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ, SMM, МАРКЕТИНГ ✓
11. Mobile tabs order: Події, Менеджмент, SMM, Маркетинг ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Column order correctly changed from SMM-МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ-МАРКЕТИНГ to МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ-SMM-МАРКЕТИНГ everywhere
Settings 4th column (автоматизація) correctly shows only Google Calendar and Altegio status
Monthly tasks correctly distributed to respective columns (management, smm, marketing) with ЩОМІСЯЦЯ sections
Mobile tabs order matches desktop column order (excluding ПОДІЇ which is first tab)
Stats page maintains consistent column order with dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Column order changes verified: МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ-SMM-МАРКЕТИНГ order applied to dashboard, settings, stats, and mobile tabs. Settings 4th column (автоматизація) now only shows Google Calendar and Altegio status - monthly tasks moved to respective 3 columns with ЩОМІСЯЦЯ sections. New endpoints: GET /api/altegio/status (returns {connected: boolean}) and GET /api/docs/app-logic (returns APP_LOGIC.md file). External URL: https://task-hub-890.preview.emergentagent.com
